claimText: The UN80 Initiative was launched in March 2025 by the UN Secretary-General to mark the 80th anniversary of the United Nations.
evidenceExcerpt: Launched in March 2025 by the UN Secretary-General to mark the UN's 80th anniversary.
examUse: Statement-based question on the origin and timeline of the initiative.
distractorHooks: Launched by the UN General Assembly

claimText: The UN80 Initiative consists of three main work streams: identifying efficiencies, reviewing mandate implementation, and examining structural changes.
evidenceExcerpt: Consists of three main work streams: identifying efficiencies, reviewing mandate implementation, and examining structural changes.
examUse: Multi-statement question identifying the core components of the initiative.
distractorHooks: Focuses on creating new UN organs

claimText: The UN80 Task Force, which coordinates the UN80 Initiative, is chaired by the Under-Secretary-General for Policy.
evidenceExcerpt: Coordinated by the UN80 Task Force, which is chaired by the Under-Secretary-General for Policy.
examUse: Statement-based question on the governance and leadership of the initiative.
distractorHooks: Chaired directly by the UN Secretary-General
Chaired by the President of the UN General Assembly
